titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Andrew Smith Gallery Records
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 8, 2020 at 05:31

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Business records, publications, catalogs, promotional ephemera, printed material, photographs, electronic media, and other papers by or relating to the Andrew Smith Gallery, Inc.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Andrew Smith Gallery, Inc. on the Frederick W. and Carrie S. Beinecke Fund for Western Americana, 2014.
November 2013 Acquisition: Gift of Andrew Smith, 2013.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Boxes 625-640 (financial records): Restricted until January 1, 2040. For further information consult the appropriate curator.
Boxes 641-645 (audiovisual materials): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Boxes 646-661 (digital media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Andrew Smith Galery Records is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Andrew Smith Gallery Records. Yale Collection of Western Americana, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.
